Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT PATRICIA CLINE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
